title: Soiled
description: A simple grow your own resources mod
body:
A simple grow your own resources mod

  • All resources can be acquired from materials in the overworld
  • Plants go through 7 stages of growth
  • Harvesting yields a random number of the resource and seeds (between 1-3 of each)
  • Flora, spawn eggs, and music discs are exceptions to this rule (yields 1 resource, 1-3 seeds)

Seed Recipes

  • All initial seed recipes yield 2 seeds
  • All recipes are shapeless. You just need the ingredients, non-stacked, in any formation
  • All seeds must be planted on farmland within 4 blocks of water (similar to crops)

Recipes can be acquired using JEI

Best experienced with The Astute rp (128x)
